title: Poached Almond Irish Stir-fry
description: A savory and creamy monsoon-inspired dish featuring almond milk as a dairy-free alternative, perfect for breakfast or snack time.

ingredients.name: Wheatgrass Powder
ingredients.amount: 1/4 teaspoon, optional for color and flavor

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Add oil and swirl to coat.
Add almonds, sauté for about 30 seconds until lightly golden.
Stir in garlic and green onions; cook for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in almond milk, add tomato paste, and a pinch of wheatgrass powder if using. Stir well to combine.
Simmer gently on medium-low heat for about 5 minutes allowing flavors to meld together.
Serve immediately as a creamy almond-based breakfast or snack dish.
